page.title: Help center
page.description: Quick guides to set up your clinic and use VetSaaS day to day.
page.empty: No results for your search. Try another keyword.
page.footer: Need more help? Contact your plan support or check the documentation from the VetSaaS team.

sede.title: Create your first branch
sede.summary: Without an active branch you cannot use register, appointments, or inventory.
steps: Go to Settings → Branches.
Click «New branch» and fill in name and address.
Keep the branch active and save.

clinic.title: Clinic details
clinic.summary: Tax ID, legal name, and logo for receipts and communications.
steps: Open Settings → General.
Fill in tax ID, legal name, and trade name.
Optional: upload the clinic logo.

paciente.title: Register a patient
paciente.summary: The pet is the center of appointments, records, and sales.
steps: Go to Clinic → Patients.
Create or select an owner.
Register the pet with species, breed, and basic data.

cita.title: Schedule an appointment
cita.summary: Organize the schedule by vet and branch.
steps: Go to Clinic → Appointments.
Pick date, time, patient, and veterinarian.
Save; you can mark it completed later.

consulta.title: Open a medical record
consulta.summary: Document care during or after the visit.
steps: From an appointment or Patients, start a consultation.
Record reason, exam, and diagnosis.
Add charges or products if needed.

vacuna.title: Record a vaccination
vacuna.summary: Track vaccines and booster due dates.
steps: Open Clinic → Vaccinations.
Select patient and product or protocol.
Save the dose and next due date.

sesion.title: Open a register session
sesion.summary: You need an open session to record sales for the shift.
steps: Go to Register → Sessions.
Click «Open register» and choose the branch.
Enter opening float if applicable.

venta.title: Record a sale
venta.summary: Charge for products and services from the POS.
steps: With register open, go to Register → New sale.
Add lines (products or concepts) and pick receipt type.
Confirm payment and issue receipt or ticket as needed.

producto.title: Add products
producto.summary: The catalog feeds sales, stock, and alerts.
steps: Inventory → Products → New product.
Set SKU, sale price, and purchase price (for margin).
Assign category and stock branch if applicable.

stock.title: Check stock
stock.summary: Review quantities by branch and product.
steps: Inventory → Stock.
Filter by branch or search by name.
Use movements for adjustments or manual entries.

compra.title: Record a purchase
compra.summary: Bring goods into inventory at real cost.
steps: Inventory → Purchases → New purchase.
Choose supplier, branch, and product lines.
Confirm to update stock automatically.

fel.title: Set up SUNAT e-invoicing
fel.summary: Connect APISUNAT to issue electronic receipts and invoices.
steps: Settings → General → Electronic invoicing section.
Enter your APISUNAT token and save.
Enable «Issue SUNAT receipts» if your plan allows it.

series.title: Receipt series
series.summary: Define F001, B001, etc. per branch.
steps: Invoicing → Series.
Create the series for invoice or receipt type.
Link it to the corresponding branch.

comprobantes.title: View issued receipts
comprobantes.summary: Check invoices, receipts, and SUNAT status.
steps: Invoicing → Issued documents.
Filter by date or type.
Download PDF/XML or review rejections.
